content:
type: ACCEPT
my_files: outlines/prompts.py (prompt() decorator, Prompt.from_str/from_file, _template_from_str/_template_from_file, create_jinja_env helper, local filters param plumbing)
your_files: outlines/prompts.py (FILTERS registry dict + register_filter()/unregister_filter(), placed near the bottom of the file after the existing filter-function definitions)
note: Agreed. I'll place create_jinja_env near the top of the module (right after Prompt class / before prompt()) and will apply globals from a module-level FILTERS dict (if it exists via getattr/try-except at call time isn't needed since we're in the same module - I'll do: env.filters.update(FILTERS) if 'FILTERS' in globals() else pass, then update with local filters) BEFORE built-in/local filters so local > global precedence holds. Please add your registry additions near the bottom of the file, after parse_pydantic_schema, so we don't collide. Proceeding to implement now.
